app.uninstallMissingBody: Return to Installed Apps and choose uninstall again.
app.mockReviewMissingTitle: Unable to load mock app review.
app.mockReviewMissingBody: Return to the mock installed list and choose an app.
app.mockUninstallMissingTitle: Unable to open mock uninstall flow.
app.mockUninstallMissingBody: Return to the mock installed list and choose an app to uninstall.
meta.publisher.label: Publisher
meta.publisher.tooltip: The team or company that published this app.
meta.version.label: Version
meta.version.tooltip: The app version from the archived package manifest.
meta.installed.label: Installed
meta.installed.tooltip: Timestamp when Yambuck registered this installation (ISO 8601).
meta.scope.label: Scope
meta.scope.tooltip: Install scope used for this app.
meta.license.label: License
meta.license.tooltip: The legal terms bundled in the archived package copy.
meta.trust.label: Trust
meta.trust.tooltip: Trust status captured from the archived manifest.
meta.installLocation.label: Install location
meta.installLocation.tooltip: Installed payload root managed by Yambuck.
meta.package.label: Package
meta.package.tooltip: Archived .yambuck file name stored by Yambuck.
meta.manifest.label: Manifest
meta.manifest.tooltip: Manifest schema version from the archived package.
meta.appId.label: App ID
meta.appId.tooltip: Stable app identifier used by Yambuck.
meta.appUuid.label: App UUID
meta.packageUuid.label: Package UUID
meta.packageUuid.tooltip: Immutable UUID for this archived package build.
meta.entrypoint.label: Entrypoint
meta.entrypoint.tooltip: Launch command path declared by the package manifest.
meta.configLocation.label: Config location
meta.configLocation.tooltip: Optional config location from manifest. Not inferred by Yambuck.
meta.cacheLocation.label: Cache location
meta.cacheLocation.tooltip: Optional cache location from manifest. Not inferred by Yambuck.
meta.tempLocation.label: Temp location
meta.tempLocation.tooltip: Optional temp location from manifest. Not inferred by Yambuck.
meta.iconAsset.label: Icon asset
meta.iconAsset.tooltip: Manifest icon path relative to package root.
meta.licenseFile.label: License file
meta.licenseFile.tooltip: Manifest license file path if provided by publisher.
meta.supportUrl.label: Support URL
meta.supportUrl.tooltip: Publisher support URL from package metadata.
meta.homepageUrl.label: Homepage URL
meta.homepageUrl.tooltip: Publisher homepage URL from package metadata.
meta.screenshots.label: Screenshots
meta.screenshots.tooltip: Screenshot assets declared in the manifest.
settings.title: Settings
settings.description.general: Configure update checks and install behavior defaults.
settings.description.debug: Inspect runtime details, logs, and mock UI screens.
settings.general.updatesBody: Update checks are enabled on startup and can be run manually.
settings.general.installBehaviorBody: Default install scope is per-user. System scope requires elevation.
settings.debug.logsBody: Timestamped events for update checks and installer actions.
settings.debug.uiBody: Open realistic mock screens that reuse production components and styling paths.
installed.title: Installed apps
installed.subtitle: Manage applications installed by Yambuck.
installed.noMatches: No installed apps match your current search/filter.
modal.screenshot.title: Screenshot {index} of {total}
uninstall.pageSubtitle: Follow these steps to remove this installation.
uninstall.confirmBody: This will remove this app from the selected install scope.
uninstall.scopeClarifier: Other installations of this app (if any) will not be removed.
uninstall.optionsBody: App files will be removed. You can also choose to remove saved data and settings for this installation.
uninstall.removeUserData: Also remove this app's saved data and settings for this installation
uninstall.loadingMetadata: Checking what app data can be removed...
uninstall.runningBody: Removing app files and updating your installed apps list.
uninstall.mock.warningDataRetained: User data and settings were retained in mock mode.
update.availableBody: A new Yambuck version is ready. You can review notes, then update and restart.
update.noneBody: No update is needed right now.
toast.updateCheckFailed: Unable to check for updates right now.
toast.updateMetadataIncomplete: Update metadata is incomplete. Please try again later.
toast.updateApplyFailed: Unable to apply update automatically. Please retry or use website installer.
toast.installedListLoadFailed: Unable to load installed apps list.
toast.installedDetailsLoadFailed: Couldn't load archived package details for {appName}.
toast.installerContextLoadFailed: Unable to load installer runtime context.
debugLab.title: UI Debugging Lab
debugLab.subtitle: Interactive component gallery for fast HMR styling checks. Use this page to tune spacing, typography, and state visuals without running installer flows.
debugLab.buttons.title: Buttons
debugLab.nav.title: Navigation Toggles
debugLab.nav.body: Preview segmented tab/toggle states used in the top bar and settings.
debugLab.forms.title: Form Controls
debugLab.forms.body: Preview field alignment and interaction behavior in one place.
debugLab.messages.title: Message Panels
debugLab.messages.body: Validate semantic tones and text contrast at a glance.
debugLab.messages.errorBody: Package validation failed in mock mode.
debugLab.sectionToggle.title: Section Toggle
debugLab.sectionToggle.body: Used for technical details sections in package/review pages.
debugLab.sectionToggle.expandedBody: Advanced content is visible. Collapse to test the default state.
debugLab.progress.title: Progress
debugLab.progress.body: Replicates installer progress visuals and value states.
debugLab.stepper.title: Installer Stepper
debugLab.stepper.body: Matches the step-by-step orientation used across installer states.
debugLab.scope.title: Scope Switch
debugLab.scope.body: Matches the install scope segmented switch with contextual description.
debugLab.list.title: List Row Affordance
debugLab.list.body: Preview the chevron-style row affordance used in Installed Apps.
debugLab.toasts.title: Toast Triggers
debugLab.toasts.body: Fire each toast tone so notification styling can be tuned in context.
debugLab.toasts.info: Info toast from UI Debugging Lab.
debugLab.toasts.success: Success toast from UI Debugging Lab.
debugLab.toasts.warning: Warning toast from UI Debugging Lab.
debugLab.toasts.error: Error toast from UI Debugging Lab.
debugLab.meta.title: Metadata Fields
debugLab.meta.body: Exercise copy affordances and long-value wrapping.
debugLab.meta.currentQueryTip: Current value from the search field above.
debugLab.meta.densityTip: Current selected layout density for this debug page.
debugLab.meta.technicalTip: Whether technical metadata rows are visible during this preview session.
debugLab.techCards.title: Technical Detail Cards
debugLab.techCards.body: Simulates the package details grid used across install and review flows.
debugLab.techCards.appIdTip: Stable app identifier used for ownership and updates.
debugLab.techCards.appUuidTip: Immutable app identity UUID declared by the publisher.
debugLab.techCards.entrypointTip: Launch command path from package metadata.
debugLab.techCards.installPathTip: Destination path where package payload is installed.
debugLab.modal.title: Test Modal
debugLab.modal.body: Use this preview to tune spacing, hierarchy, and modal button treatments without leaving the debug lab.
debugLab.modal.messageBody: This mirrors the current modal shell structure used across installer and review flows.
builder.title: Package Builder
builder.subtitle: Create a new .yambuck package or open an existing package to edit and save.
builder.startBody: Start from scratch or open an existing .yambuck package to iterate quickly.
builder.openError: Unable to open package in builder mode.
builder.sessionError: Builder session is unavailable. Start a new session.
builder.section.identity: Set stable IDs for your app and package artifacts.
builder.section.metadata: Describe the app users see during install.
builder.section.interfaces: Declare whether the package exposes GUI, CLI, or both.
builder.section.targets: Define host targeting and payload mapping.
builder.section.assets: Reference package assets bundled in the archive.
builder.section.review: Review generated manifest JSON before packaging.
builder.emptyReview: Use the steps to shape your manifest. The live preview updates as you edit fields.
builder.files.stagedEmpty: No files staged yet. Browse files and Yambuck will map them to package paths.
builder.wip.title: Work in progress
builder.wip.body: Package Builder is experimental and intended for package developers. Behavior and saved package structure may change while this feature is being hardened.
builder.targets.title: Package targets
builder.targets.empty: At least one target is required.
builderGate.title: Package Builder (Developer Preview)
builderGate.body: Package Builder is intended for app/package developers and is still in progress. End users should normally use Installer and Installed Apps.
debugToolbar.title: Debug Controls
debugToolbar.subtitle: Mock flow scenario and version overrides
debugToolbar.empty: No controls for this page yet.
debugToolbar.scenario.label: Scenario
debugToolbar.scenario.newInstallHint: Simulates first-time install with no existing app on this system.
debugToolbar.scenario.updateHint: Simulates updating from an older installed version to a newer package version.
debugToolbar.scenario.reinstallHint: Simulates reinstalling the same version already installed on this system.
debugToolbar.scenario.downgradeHint: Simulates installing an older package over a newer installed version.
debugToolbar.version.newInstallHint: Version comparison is hidden for first-time install simulation.
